## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Standards update

## Checklist

- [ ] I have verified no secrets or private IPs are committed
- [ ] I have tested these changes locally
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] My code follows the repository's style guidelines
- [ ] I have reviewed the [Privacy Policy](../../PRIVACY_POLICY.md)

## Privacy Check

Confirm that this PR:
- [ ] Contains no hardcoded IP addresses
- [ ] Contains no API keys or tokens
- [ ] Contains no personal file paths
- [ ] Contains no internal hostnames
